Finding: CLI uses System.CommandLine 2.0.3 with imperative command registration: Command() + Options + SetAction. No abstraction layer. Root -> subcommands flat structure.
StateMachineMetadata has: StateHandlerMap (state->methods), InitialStateKey, GuardNames, StateMetadataMap (state->StateInfo), Machine (boxed). Route template NOT included.
StateMachineMetadata is created in Run() and added to each endpoint via builder.Metadata.Add(metadata). Metadata is on the Endpoint object.
ResourceSpec.Build creates RouteEndpoint array. Each endpoint has RoutePattern (for route template) and Metadata collection. Route template available via RouteEndpoint.RoutePattern.RawText.

ALL format modules are internal: Wsd.Generator, Wsd.Serializer, Wsd.Parser, Alps.JsonParser, Alps.JsonGenerator, Alps.Mapper, Scxml.Parser, Scxml.Mapper, Scxml.Generator, Smcat.Parser, Smcat.Mapper, Smcat.Generator, all Types.fs
InternalsVisibleTo only includes Frank.Statecharts.Tests. CLI project not included.
Validator.validate: ValidationRule list -> FormatArtifact list -> ValidationReport. Takes rules + artifacts, returns comprehensive report. Validation types are public (not internal).
WSD Generator is the central metadata-to-AST converter: StateMachineMetadata -> Result<StatechartDocument, GeneratorError>. All other AST-based formats go through this.
smcat Generator has direct metadata-to-text path: StateMachineMetadata -> string. Does not go through shared AST.
No XState serializer or deserializer exists. Only XStateMeta annotation stubs in Ast/Types.fs and FormatTag.XState in Validation/Types.fs.
Frank.Cli.Core does NOT reference Frank.Statecharts. Has dotNetRdf, FSharp.Compiler.Service, Ionide.ProjInfo. Targets net10.0 only.
ResourceEndpointDataSource is type internal -- cannot use from CLI. But Resource.Endpoints (Endpoint[]) is public struct.
JSON output uses Utf8JsonWriter with Indented=true. camelCase field names. status field always first. formatError uses anonymous record + JsonSerializer.
Text output uses StringBuilder. isColorEnabled() checks NO_COLOR env var and Console.IsOutputRedirected. formatError wraps in red.
Help metadata is hardcoded CommandHelp records with Name, Summary, Examples, Workflow, Context fields. allCommands is the source of truth list.
